name: Desmodus Versio
description: Stereo-in, stereo-out synthetic tail-generator reverb and DSP platform. Sparse-FDN reverberator with LFO modulation, shimmer, and sidechain-style ducking. Firmware-updateable via USB.

controls.name: Blend
controls.description: Dry/wet balance. Full left=dry only, full right=wet only, center=equal mix.

controls.name: Tone
controls.description: Bipolar filter in reverb tank. Left=lowpass, right=highpass, center=disabled.

controls.name: Regen
controls.description: Feedback in reverb tank. Controls reverb length, infinite tails past noon, and input ducking past 3 o'clock.
controls.detail: Full CCW=min · ~11 o'clock=shorter reverbs · past noon=infinite tail · past 3 o'clock=ducking

controls.name: Speed
controls.description: Rate of the internal LFO that modulates delay lines (amount set by Index).

controls.name: Index
controls.description: Bipolar LFO amount sent to delay lines. Center=disabled. Left=random LFO. Right=sine LFO.

controls.name: Size
controls.description: Delay time of the reverb. Shorter values = smaller spaces.

controls.name: Dense
controls.description: Spacing of delay lines. Full left=delay-like, full right=smeared reverb.

controls.name: FSU Button
controls.description: Maxes out Regen and mutes input while pressed, creating a wall of infinite reverb.
controls.detail: Momentary · also responds to gate input >+2V

controls.name: LIM/DST/SHM Switch
controls.description: Reverb style: LIM=clean limiting, DST=saturation distortion, SHM=shimmer with octave-up pitch shift feedback.

controls.name: BND/LRP/JMP Switch
controls.description: Controls how delay lines respond when modulated. BND=smooth crossfade (pitch-neutral), LRP=gradual pitch glide (Doppler effect), JMP=instant hard cut (glitchy artifacts).

inputs.name: In L
inputs.description: Left audio input. Normalled to right input when R is unpatched (mono in).

inputs.name: In R
inputs.description: Right audio input. If unpatched, L signal is normalled to both inputs.

inputs.name: FSU Gate
inputs.description: Gate input. High gate maxes Regen and mutes input, same as FSU button.

inputs.name: Blend CV
inputs.description: CV input for Blend parameter. Sums with pot position.

inputs.name: Tone CV
inputs.description: CV input for Tone parameter. Sums with pot position.

inputs.name: Regen CV
inputs.description: CV input for Regen parameter. Sums with pot position.

inputs.name: Size CV
inputs.description: CV input for Size parameter. Sums with pot position.

inputs.name: Speed CV
inputs.description: CV input for Speed parameter. Sums with pot position.

inputs.name: Index CV
inputs.description: CV input for Index parameter. Sums with pot position.

inputs.name: Dense CV
inputs.description: CV input for Dense parameter. Sums with pot position.

behaviors.name: Shimmer
behaviors.description: Adds a one-octave pitch shift that feeds back into the reverb input, creating ethereal shimmering reverb tails. The shimmer intensity is governed by Regen — just past noon gives subtle shimmer; higher values create aggressive, self-building octave stacks.

behaviors.name: Infinite Tail / Ducking
behaviors.description: Past noon the reverb reaches 100% feedback for infinite tail. Past 3 o'clock, new input sounds duck the infinite reverb — input transients carve space in the frozen tail, creating a natural sidechain compression effect without any external module.

behaviors.name: Self-Oscillation
behaviors.description: With input unpatched and Regen past noon, DV self-oscillates. Manipulate Size, Dense, Tone, and Style to shape the generated tones. Pitch is loosely related to Size — smaller values create higher, bell-like tones.

behaviors.name: Simple Delay
behaviors.description: With Dense fully CCW, the effect sounds like a delay rather than reverb. Regen sets feedback amount. BND/LRP/JMP switch changes how pitch artifacts appear when you sweep delay time.

behaviors.name: FSU (Freeze)
behaviors.description: Maxes feedback to 100% and mutes input. Current reverb buffer loops indefinitely. SHM mode causes frozen pad to rise in pitch over time. DST mode allows distortion to accumulate inside the frozen buffer each cycle.

behaviors.name: Self-Sustaining Drone
behaviors.description: FSU injects white noise burst into reverb tank with infinite feedback. Becomes a self-sustaining drone voice with no audio input required. Shape with Tone (LP/HP filter), Size (pitch/density), Dense (smear vs delay character).

behaviors.name: BND switch (delay interpolation)
behaviors.description: Three modes control how Size and Dense changes are rendered: BND=smooth crossfade between delay times (pitch-neutral, clean), LRP=gradual pitch glide between times (Doppler-like warble), JMP=instant hard cut to new delay time (digital glitch, metallic artifacts). Applies to both manual knob sweeps and Size CV modulation.

behaviors.name: Regen past 3 o'clock
behaviors.description: Activates sidechain-ducking zone: the infinite tail remains in feedback, but incoming input transients carve dynamic space in it automatically. Acts like a natural compressor/ducker — louder hits create more space. Useful for rhythmic sources that need clarity without losing the infinite tail underneath.

behaviors.name: Versio firmware platform
behaviors.description: The Versio hardware platform runs any compatible Versio firmware — Electus Versio (stereo delay), Ampla Versio (VCA/limiter), Ruina Versio (distortion), and community ports. Reflash via USB in approximately 2 minutes using the Noise Engineering web flasher. Community firmware index at github.com/Maxhodges/noise-engineering-firmware-index.

patchIdeas.name: Shimmer pad
patchIdeas.patch: Mode: SHM · BND switch · Size 1-2 o'clock · Dense 3 o'clock · Regen just past noon · Tone slightly CW · Index noon (no modulation) · Blend 2 o'clock · feed polyphonic chord source · octave-up shimmer feeds back into reverb, building a luminous pad above the dry signal

patchIdeas.name: Dark ambient plate
patchIdeas.patch: Mode: LIM · BND switch · Size 10-11 o'clock · Dense 2-3 o'clock · Regen 9-11 o'clock · Tone noon or slightly CCW (subtle LP roll-off) · Index center (no LFO) · Blend 1-2 o'clock · short diffuse plate with no modulation artifacts · works as a natural room on any source

patchIdeas.name: Rhythmic ducking reverb
patchIdeas.patch: Mode: LIM · Regen past 3 o'clock · BND switch · patch kick or rhythmic gate source into In L · Tone slightly CW · Blend full CW · input transients automatically duck the infinite tail · reverb breathes in rhythm with the groove, no VCA or sidechain required

patchIdeas.name: Accumulating distortion freeze
patchIdeas.patch: Mode: DST · BND switch · Size noon · Dense 2 o'clock · Regen past noon · hold FSU button (or send sustained gate to FSU Gate) · each feedback cycle runs through distortion algorithm, building incrementally · 5-10 seconds: clean frozen buffer → heavy saturation → release FSU for distorted tail decay

patchIdeas.name: Drone voice from nothing
patchIdeas.patch: No audio patched to In L or In R · Mode: LIM or SHM · Regen past noon · press and hold FSU button (or gate FSU Gate high) · white noise burst sustains indefinitely in infinite feedback · Tone sweeps LP to HP to sculpt harmonic content · Size adjusts apparent pitch density · Dense shifts smear character · full drone synthesizer with no oscillator

patchIdeas.name: Modulated size for chorus-in-reverb
patchIdeas.patch: Mode: LIM · BND switch set to BND · slow sine LFO (e.g. Pamela's PRO Workout Out A sine, 0.1–0.3 Hz) → Size CV · Size knob at noon · Dense 2-3 o'clock · Regen just past noon · creates lush detuned chorus effect inside the reverb tank — modulation is wet-only, dry signal stays stable

patchIdeas.name: Pitch-rise freeze
patchIdeas.patch: Mode: SHM · BND switch · Size 11 o'clock · Regen just past noon · Tone noon · hold FSU (or gate FSU Gate) · octave-up shift compounds inside frozen buffer · pad slowly rises in pitch over 10-30 seconds · release FSU before it gets too bright to allow natural shimmer tail to decay · dramatic textural build technique

patchIdeas.name: Gate-sequenced freeze stutter
patchIdeas.patch: Gate sequencer (e.g. Pamela's PRO Workout euclidean output) → FSU Gate input · Mode: LIM · BND switch · Regen past noon · Blend 3 o'clock · short gates (25ms–100ms): rapid freeze/release creates stuttered rhythmic reverb gating · long gates: sustained freeze pads · gate pattern locks stutter rhythm to clock

patchIdeas.name: Metallic IDM texture
patchIdeas.patch: BND switch: JMP · stepped random CV (S&H) → Size CV · Size knob 9 o'clock · Dense full CW · Mode: DST · Regen 2 o'clock · each random step hard-jumps delay time creating metallic pitch artifacts and digital noise bursts · combine with Tone CV (random or LFO) for evolving spectral texture

patchIdeas.name: Filter sweep inside reverb
patchIdeas.patch: Mode: LIM · BND switch · Regen past noon · Size noon · Dense 3 o'clock · triangle LFO → Tone CV · sweep full range LP to HP · Tone knob at noon (CV takes full control) · wah-like tonal motion happens inside the wet reverb tail itself — dry signal stays unchanged · Speed parameter controls LFO rate if using internal LFO on Index CW instead
